title: Battle Towers
body:
This datapack/mod adds tower dungeons containing monster spawners and chests filled with loot. 
The towers are guarded by a fireball-launching Wither Skeleton with an increased health pool.

<details>
<summary> Possible Loot (as of v. 1.2)</summary>
  
The chests on each floor contain loot from one of the following loot tables:
  
```
  minecraft:chests/simple_dungeon
  minecraft:chests/village/village_mason
  minecraft:chests/stronghold_crossing
  minecraft:chests/igloo_chest
  minecraft:chests/village/village_fletcher
  minecraft:chests/village/village_weaponsmith
  minecraft:chests/village/village_toolsmith
  battle_towers:treasure
```

while the chests on top of the tower contain loot exclusively from 
```
minecraft:chests/village/village_weaponsmith
minecraft:chests/simple_dungeon
battle_towers:treasure
```

The treasure loot table can contain enchanted books, diamonds, emeralds and gold ingots.
</details>



Inspired by AtomicStryker's Battle Towers.
